title: Golden Pan-Seared Syrian Potatoes Hash
description: A hearty, winey Syrian dish featuring tender red potatoes and a hint of bonito.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large kadhai over medium-high heat.
Add the diced potatoes and cook, stirring occasionally, until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the bonito flakes and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the chopped parsley, salt, black pepper, and crushed red pepper flakes. Stir to combine.
Use a spatula to press the potatoes into the bottom of the kadhai and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the kadhai to the oven and bake, uncovered, at 400°F (200°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the kadhai from the oven and stir in the red wine vinegar.
Serve the Golden Pan-Seared Syrian Potatoes Hash hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
